docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73257223) TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2025 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
